metadata.name: wick
metadata.description: Wick — ultra-short-dated options on MagicBlock Ephemeral Rollups, hedged on Flash Trade

accounts.name: operator
docs: Wallet authority or the registered session key.

accounts.name: operator
docs: Wallet authority or the registered session key.

errors.name: Paused
errors.msg: Protocol is paused

errors.name: MarketDisabled
errors.msg: Market is disabled

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Signer is not authorized for this user account

errors.name: BetTooSmall
errors.msg: Stake is below the minimum bet

errors.name: BetTooLarge
errors.msg: Stake is above the maximum bet

errors.name: InvalidDuration
errors.msg: Duration outside the allowed range

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient balance

errors.name: InsufficientHouseLiquidity
errors.msg: House liquidity cannot cover this bet

errors.name: NoFreeBetSlot
errors.msg: No free bet slot — resolve an open bet first

errors.name: BetNotOpen
errors.msg: Bet slot is not an open bet

errors.name: MarketMismatch
errors.msg: Bet belongs to a different market

errors.name: NotExpired
errors.msg: Bet has not expired yet — no settlement print available

errors.name: FeedMismatch
errors.msg: Feed account does not match the market's pinned feed

errors.name: InvalidFeed
errors.msg: Feed data is invalid or unsupported

errors.name: StaleFeed
errors.msg: Feed print is too old to open a position against

errors.name: OpenBetsRemain
errors.msg: Account still has open bets

errors.name: BadMarketIndex
errors.msg: Market index out of range

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: SymbolMismatch
errors.msg: Symbol mismatch

errors.name: SettlementWindowMissed
errors.msg: Settlement print is past the grace window — this bet must be voided

errors.name: BetNotVoidable
errors.msg: Bet is still resolvable — the settlement window has not closed

errors.name: ExpiryInPast
errors.msg: Bet would already be expired at placement — feed print too old

errors.name: InvalidParams
errors.msg: Invalid protocol parameters

errors.name: InvalidBarrier
errors.msg: Barrier distance is not one of the allowed presets

errors.name: NotTouchBet
errors.msg: Bet is not a one-touch barrier option

errors.name: NotTouched
errors.msg: Barrier has not been touched in the live window

fields.name: kind
docs: BET_KIND_BINARY or BET_KIND_TOUCH.

fields.name: strike
docs: BINARY: the strike price. TOUCH: the barrier price (direction = which
side: UP = barrier above the entry, DOWN = barrier below).

fields.name: price_authority
docs: Keeper key allowed to push WickFeed prices (Flash Trade exotics).

fields.name: payout_bps
docs: Total return on a win in bps of stake (19_000 = 1.9x back, 0.9x profit).

fields.name: max_feed_age_ms
docs: Max age of a feed print at placement time, in ms. Must stay well below
min_duration_s*1000 so a bet can never be born at (or past) expiry.

fields.name: resolve_grace_ms
docs: Settlement must use a print in [expiry, expiry + resolve_grace_ms];
past that the bet is voidable (stake refunded) instead of resolvable.

fields.name: oracle_program
docs: Expected owner of kind-0 (Pyth Lazer) feed accounts on the ER.
Pubkey::default() disables the check (localnet has no kind-0 markets).

types.name: House
docs: House liquidity ledger. Tokens live in the L1 vault; this tracks the house share.

fields.name: locked
docs: Sum of potential profit payouts across all open bets (solvency reserve).

types.name: MarketBook
docs: Per-market open-interest book. Delegated to the ER; read by the hedger keeper.

fields.name: feed
docs: Pinned feed account this market settles against.

fields.name: session_key
docs: Ephemeral browser key allowed to trade for this account (gasless one-tap UX).

types.name: WickFeed
docs: Wick's own pushed feed (Flash Trade exotic markets; also used on localnet).
ts_ms is millisecond-precision, unlike Pyth receiver's seconds.
